programmes.show_name: And The Academy Award Goes To ...
programmes.show_description: 3/4. Paul Gambaccini examines the controversial 2006 Oscar winner exploring society tensions in Los Angeles. From 2009.

programmes.show_name: In Search of the Singing Postman
programmes.show_description: DJ Taylor goes in search of The Singing Postman - the bard of Norfolk who ended his days in a Salvation Army hostel. From 2010.
